message:
docs(vc_store): document mid-migration DuckDB → FrankenSQLite state

vc_store currently has both `duckdb` and `fsqlite` as required deps —
DuckDB is the live runtime backend, FrankenSQLite is wired in alongside
while the per-statement translation work lands. The crate's package
description and lib.rs doc comment both still said "DuckDB storage
layer", which misled fresh-clone readers (issue #3) into thinking
duckdb was leftover after migration completion.

Updates:
- crates/vc_store/Cargo.toml: description now flags the migration
  in progress and points readers at migrations.rs for the canonical
  translation map.
- crates/vc_store/src/lib.rs: module doc comment leads with a
  "Migration status" block, lists the related beads (bd-axj, bd-dfl,
  bd-phr, bd-h6y, bd-zut, bd-s8lm) for per-area cutover audits, and
  marks DuckDB connection management / schema migrations as live
  vs FrankenSQLite-tracked respectively.

No behavior change. Closes #3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ edition.workspace = true
 authors.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
-description = "DuckDB storage layer for Vibe Cockpit"
+description = "Storage layer for Vibe Cockpit (DuckDB → FrankenSQLite migration in progress; see crates/vc_store/src/migrations.rs)"
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true

@@ -1,8 +1,19 @@
-//! `vc_store` - `DuckDB` storage layer for Vibe Cockpit
+//! `vc_store` — Vibe Cockpit storage layer.
 //!
-//! This crate provides:
-//! - `DuckDB` connection management
-//! - Schema migrations
+//! **Migration status:** mid-migration from DuckDB to FrankenSQLite
+//! (`fsqlite`). DuckDB remains the live runtime backend; FrankenSQLite
+//! is wired in alongside while the per-statement translation work
+//! lands. Both `duckdb` and `fsqlite` are required workspace deps
+//! during this phase. See [`migrations`] for the complete DuckDB →
+//! FrankenSQLite type/function/syntax map (the single source of truth
+//! for what each construct becomes after migration), and the related
+//! beads (`bd-axj`, `bd-dfl`, `bd-phr`, `bd-h6y`, `bd-zut`,
+//! `bd-s8lm`) for the per-area cutover audits.
+//!
+//! This crate currently provides:
+//! - `DuckDB` connection management (live)
+//! - Schema migrations (DuckDB-shaped today; FrankenSQLite shape
+//!   tracked in [`migrations`])
 //! - Data ingestion helpers
 //! - Query utilities
